## Why Do You Need an Online Coding Tool for Interview?

Coding test automates your interview process, allowing you to test coding skills in real-time

**Pair Programming:** Evaluate Real-time As The Candidate Codes Live On-Screen

**Objective Evaluation:** Evaluate Objectively Using Auto-Graded Simulators

**Data Analysis:** Assess Using Data From Previous Screening Rounds

**Digital Ideation:** Communicate Digitally using Whiteboard and Notepad

![]()
